title: Eternal Flame:Romance Dawn
description:
Eternal Flame: Romantic Dawn 

Eternal Flame: Romantic Dawn follows the epic journey of Peter as he struggles to uncover the fate of a world that has become extinct. From the depths of underground dungeons to the ruins of ancient castles, from enchanted forests to burning temples, Peter must uncover the secrets of an ancient power and discover its true origins. He must traverse dangerous lands, face undermanned enemies and challenging monsters to regain the lost ray of the legendary Lumiran Flame. Each battle is a test of skill and determination. Details with Unreal Engine, RPG battle system development, magic skill combat system are used. It is single player. Approximately 5-7 hours of game time.
description_short: A Souls-like action RPG with brutal boss battles and tactical combat mechanics. Face tough enemies, use powerful abilities and survive in a dark world.
